## Checklist

- [ ] PR targets the `dev` branch (not `main`) — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Changes are scoped to a single topic
- [ ] CI is green (lint, tests)
- [ ] Documentation updated where relevant (README / CLAUDE.md / DESIGN_CONVENTIONS.md)
- [ ] Schema changes ship an Alembic migration (no manual `ALTER TABLE`)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data committed
